title: Restaurant Settings
name: Name
slugHint: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.
logoUploadHint: Drag photo here or click to select
logoReadyToSave: Logo selected and ready to save
logoWillUploadOnSave: New logo will be uploaded only after pressing "Save".
defaultLanguageHint: The language the admin writes content in. Other languages are auto-translated.
enabledLanguagesHint: Content is automatically translated into the selected languages. If none selected — all supported languages are used.
